dep.name: mcp
dep.purpose: FastMCP framework for MCP server implementation

dep.name: httpx
dep.purpose: Async HTTP client for Responses API calls

dep.name: python-dotenv
dep.purpose: Load .env file for API key configuration

constraint.reason: FastMCP API changed significantly between 0.x and 1.x
Uses match/case and modern type hints

module-level.focus: Fast deterministic unit checks with mocked API responses

wave-level.focus: Integration checks with real-like API interaction patterns

phase-level.focus: Full test suite including edge cases and error handling

Testing.mocking-policy: Use httpx mock transports for API tests. Never call real API in tests.

Observability.redaction: Never log API keys, full request bodies with code, or raw response payloads larger than 1KB.

DeliveryShape.shape: Single Python package installed via uv/pip. Runs as MCP stdio server invoked by Kilo Code. No HTTP server, no Docker, no database.
